CustomField.description: Specifies how KPI values are split for accrual calculations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: * Total: Uses the total KPI value for the tactic product time frame. * Period: Splits KPI value for the tactic product by week or period, to generate an accrual rule out of the total value on tactic product level or generate a value by period on the tactic product level.
CustomField.label: Accrual Rule Time Granularity
